narrative:
Beavercreek 017 (precinct in Greene County) has 834 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
